error_signature: TypeError: Cannot assign to read only property 'name' of object 'Error'
title: Error when using Puppeteer in n8n task runner
symptom: When executing Puppeteer or Playwright in the n8n task runner, an error occurs stating 'TypeError: Cannot assign to read only property 'name' of object 'Error'. This prevents the libraries from functioning correctly.
applies_when: Using n8n 2.3.2 with external task runners
not_this_if: Running Puppeteer directly with node outside of n8n
root_cause: The task runner's strict mode prevents modifications to the Error prototype, which Puppeteer and Playwright attempt to do. This leads to the TypeError when these libraries are executed within the n8n task runner environment.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable N8N_RUNNERS_ALLOW_PROTOTYPE_MUTATION to 'true'.
If the issue persists, consider building a custom n8n image with Chromium pre-installed and configured to avoid using the task runner for Puppeteer.
agent_instruction: Try setting N8N_RUNNERS_ALLOW_PROTOTYPE_MUTATION to 'true' and test again.
